data.description: ~12 cards, various players. Includes Rollie Fingers OPC, Dale Murphy, and assorted oddballs. Beat up but vintage 1970s.

data.notes: OPC variants have Canadian collector market. Rollie Fingers HOF adds appeal. Lean into the age, not the grade.

terms: rollie fingers dale murphy vintage lot

data.notes: Beat-up condition pulls this well below the $40-50 range for nicer 30-50 card lots. 12 cards, Acceptable grade, OPC Fingers is the anchor.

data.title: 1970s Vintage Baseball Card Lot 12 Cards Rollie Fingers OPC Dale Murphy Oddballs
data.description:
A dozen cards from the 1970s including a Rollie Fingers O-Pee-Chee, a Dale Murphy, and a handful of oddballs from the era. These are not wall-hangers — they're beat up the way 50-year-old cards get beat up. But they're real vintage, the real thing, and the Fingers OPC alone makes it interesting for Canadian set collectors.

Cards | ~12 total
Era | 1970s
Highlights | Rollie Fingers O-Pee-Chee, Dale Murphy, assorted oddballs
Condition | Acceptable — well-worn, honest vintage condition
Brands | Topps, O-Pee-Chee, assorted

All my listings ship with free shipping for your ease, none of this $30 shipping on a 1 pound item. I price my listings fairly but please feel free to make an offer.

Sold As Is.
data.condition_field: ~12 cards, Acceptable condition overall. Well-worn vintage 1970s cards — expect rounded corners, soft edges, possible creases. Rollie Fingers O-Pee-Chee and Dale Murphy are the highlights. Oddballs included. See photos for the full spread.
